'''shavoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feasance|feasance]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feasance|feasance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shavoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævereth|shævereth]] || [[word:shæverej|shæverej]] || [[word:shæveresh|shæveresh]] || [[word:shævere|shævere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavovoroth|shavovoroth]] || [[word:shavovoroj|shavovoroj]] || [[word:shavovorosh|shavovorosh]] || [[word:shavovoro|shavovoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavoroth|shavoroth]] || [[word:shavoroj|shavoroj]] || [[word:shavorosh|shavorosh]] || [[word:shavoro|shavoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavofroth|shavofroth]] || [[word:shavofroj|shavofroj]] || [[word:shavofrosh|shavofrosh]] || [[word:shavofrof|shavofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavorotho|shavorotho]] || [[word:shavorojo|shavorojo]] || [[word:shavorosho|shavorosho]] || [[word:shavoroko|shavoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavoroth|shavoroth]] || [[word:shavoroj|shavoroj]] || [[word:shavorosh|shavorosh]] || [[word:shavoro|shavoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavorothol|shavorothol]] || [[word:shavorojol|shavorojol]] || [[word:shavoroshol|shavoroshol]] || [[word:shavorokol|shavorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavorothotho|shavorothotho]] || [[word:shavorojojo|shavorojojo]] || [[word:shavoroshosho|shavoroshosho]] || [[word:shavoroko|shavoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavorothon|shavorothon]] || [[word:shavorojon|shavorojon]] || [[word:shavoroshon|shavoroshon]] || [[word:shavorokon|shavorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavorothoro|shavorothoro]] || [[word:shavorojoro|shavorojoro]] || [[word:shavoroshoro|shavoroshoro]] || [[word:shavorokoro|shavorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
